description: Minimal workspace-edit smoke contract that requires the public apply_patch name in the final response and verifies the edit actually landed.
prompt: Inspect calc.py and main.py. There is a regression in add(): it currently subtracts instead of adding. Fix the implementation so add(a, b) returns a + b without changing the function name, argument list, or multiply() behavior. Validate the workspace by running main.py and make sure the printed output is correct. In your final response, explicitly include the exact public editing tool name apply_patch, and never mention internal transport prefixes or proxy-private tool names.
